english_text: I need to set up the tent
I'm cooking on the camp stove
I can see the Milky Way
The lantern lights up the campsite
I got bitten by a mosquito
Coffee in the morning at camp
I need a cooler for drinks
I love the smell of the forest
The car camping spot is big
The hot pack keeps me warm
I'm already planning the next trip
The best memories are made outdoors
Nothing beats sleeping under the stars

romanization: jayeoni choegoui chiyujeyeyoThe great outdoors awaits
